tracks.title: Life as a Git repository
tracks.lyrics:
I am the keeper of every choice you make,
Each commit a moment, a step that you take,
I hold all your branches, the paths left behind,
Every version of yourself that you'll ever find.

I'm tracking your story, line after line,
You push when you're ready, I hold what is mine,
I'm life as a git repo, I never forget,
Every change that you made, every chance, no regret.

You branch when you're dreaming of something brand new,
I keep the original while growing with you,
Merge back when you're ready, resolve the conflict,
Your history written in every commit.

I'm tracking your story, line after line,
You push when you're ready, I hold what is mine,
I'm life as a git repo, I never forget,
Every change that you made, every chance, no regret.

I have your main timeline, your master of time,
But I celebrate every experimental design,
Your failures are stashed but they're never erased,
Just waiting for you if you need to retrace,
You rebase your past into something more clean,
I'm here in the silence between what has been,
Each pull request is a conversation with fate,
I'm patient, I'm faithful, I simply await.

I'm tracking your story, line after line,
You push when you're ready, I hold what is mine,
I'm life as a git repo, I never forget,
Every change that you made, every chance, no regret,
Every change that you made, every chance, no regret.
